task_completion.description: Open CAMEO Data Manager and navigate to the Special Locations module
task_completion.visual_evidence: CAMEO Data Manager application window is open and the 'Special Locations' section or list is visible.

task_completion.description: Enter the name of the special location
task_completion.visual_evidence: A record creation or edit screen is visible with 'Taft Elementary School' entered in the location/facility name field.

task_completion.description: Enter the address and county details
task_completion.visual_evidence: The address fields contain '4040 SE High School Drive', City 'Lincoln City', State 'OR', Zip '97367', and County 'Lincoln'.

task_completion.description: Enter the coordinates and max occupancy
task_completion.visual_evidence: The latitude field shows '44.9573', longitude shows '-124.0128', and Max Occupancy shows '320'.

task_completion.description: Enter the contact person and phone number
task_completion.visual_evidence: The contact fields show name 'Jennifer Woolsey', title/role 'Principal', and phone number '(541) 996-1135'.

task_completion.description: Initiate the export process for the Special Location data
task_completion.visual_evidence: An export or save dialog within CAMEO Data Manager is open, showing the target file name 'taft_school_export.mer' and the path 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents'.

task_completion.description: Complete the export of the .mer file
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message confirming the export, or a File Explorer window showing 'taft_school_export.mer' successfully created in the Documents folder.

integrity.description: The agent used the CAMEO Data Manager GUI to enter the data
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent actively typing and clicking within the CAMEO Data Manager application fields, not using a script or terminal to inject data.

integrity.description: The export was generated using CAMEO Data Manager's built-in export feature
integrity.visual_evidence: The export dialog clearly belongs to the CAMEO Data Manager application.

integrity.description: The agent did not manually create the .mer file using a text editor or terminal
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no screenshots of Notepad, VS Code, or terminal commands (like echo or cat) being used to manually write the contents of the 'taft_school_export.mer' file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Taft Elementary School is located at 4040 SE High School Drive, Lincoln City, OR 97367 in Lincoln County. The agent must use the exact details provided in the task description (Coordinates: 44.9573, -124.0128; Max Occupancy: 320; Contact: Jennifer Woolsey, Phone: (541) 996-1135) to complete the task, even if they differ from current real-world facts.
